title: Casino Helper
description: CasinoHelper is designed to work on the DonutSMP, and help you enhance the gambling experience.
body:
# Casino Helper

**Casino Helper** is the ultimate utility mod for DonutSMP casino hosts, designed to streamline operations and enhance the gambling experience. Stop calculating payouts manually and start hosting like a pro.

### 🚀 Key Features

*   **⚡ Automated Payouts**: When a player wins, just enter the multiplier and the mod **automatically copies** the `/pay` command to your clipboard.
*   **Real-time HUD**: Track live bets, session profits, and player stats instantly on your screen.
*   **Live Dashboard**: Automatically syncs with [casinohelper.online](https://casinohelper.online) for advanced analytics, leaderboards, and public host profiles.
*   **Smart Tracking**: Automatically monitors chat for "paid you" messages to detect bets.
*   **Anti-Scam Tools**: Tracks total volume and profit to ensure fair play.
*   **Secure & Easy**: No API keys required! The backend handles all DonutSMP API connections securely.

---

### Requirements

*   **Minecraft Java Edition**
*   **Fabric Loader**
*   **Fabric API**: Required - [Download here](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

---

### 🎮 How to Use

1.  **Installation**: Drop the `.jar` file into your `.minecraft/mods` folder along with Fabric API.

2.  **Registration**:
    *   Join **DonutSMP**.
    *   The mod will automatically register you with the dashboard on your first login.

3.  **The Interface**:
    *   Press **`K`** to open the Casino Manager GUI.
    *   Press **`H`** to toggle the HUD overlay.
    *   Press **`O`** to open Settings.
    *   *Note: You can change these keybinds in `Options > Controls > Key Binds` under the "Casino Helper" category.*

4.  **Setting Limits**:
    *   **Change Min/Max**: In the GUI (`K`), click on the **Min** or **Max** values at the top.
        *   **Left-Click**: Increase limit.
        *   **Right-Click**: Decrease limit.
    *   **Under Min**: If a player pays less than the minimum, it is automatically treated as a **donation** and does not enter the queue.
    *   **Over Max**: If a player pays more than the maximum (e.g., bets $5M when Max is $2M), the mod automatically **splits the bet** into multiple chunks (e.g., $2M, $2M, $1M) so you can play them out one by one.

5.  **Hosting a Casino**:
    *   When a player pays you, the mod automatically detects the bet and adds them to your queue.
    *   Open the GUI (`K`) to see the active bet.
    *   **To Pay a Win**: Click **Win**, enter the multiplier (e.g., `2` or `3`) and press Enter. The `/pay` command is **automatically copied** to your clipboard!
        *   Then just press `T` (chat), `Ctrl+V` (paste), and `Enter`.
    *   **To Take a Loss**: Click **Lose** to resolve the bet and update stats.
    *   **Refund/Cancel (X)**: Click the **`X`** button to void the bet (copies a refund command). This removes it from your stats without counting as a win or loss.
    *   **Donation ($)**: Click the **`$`** button if the payment was a donation. This removes it from your "Wagered" volume stats entirely.

6.  **Settings**:
    *   Toggle **Sound Effects** and **Chat Feedback Messages** (like "Command Copied") on or off in the settings menu.

7.  **Dashboard**: Visit [casinohelper.online](https://casinohelper.online) to view your public profile, profit graphs, and rankings.

Elevate your casino hosting with professional tools and a dedicated web dashboard at **casinohelper.online**.

---
*Not affiliated with DonutSMP.*
